rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH MILES VS. MARC SHISHIDO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 30, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTS PASQUALE CAIAZZA AND THE STRUNZO DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION OF CALIFORNI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication DENIED. Triable issues of material fact re: Facts 18 and 19. Defendants objections to Plaintiff's evidence in opposition to these facts are OVERRULED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH MILES VS. MARC SHISHIDO et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 30, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANTS MARC SHISHIDO AND NATALIE SHISHIDO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Motion for Summary Judgment is framed by the pleadings. Statute of Limitations does not bar the claim as to all items of personal property subject to this action. Defendants cite no authority for the proposition (1) that summary adjudication may be granted only as to part of a cause of action or (2) that statute of limitations re: conversion of particular item starts to run when a different item is reported stolen.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT SIMONELLI ET AL VS. BROWNING PROPERTIES, L.L.C. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Robert Simonelli
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 30, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTS DIPAK PATEL AND 441 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Plaintiff Robert Simonelli Transferred to department 301 to be heard on February 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIAN B MOHR VS. EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, January 30, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED IN PART and OVERRULED IN PART. Demurrer to cause of action for waste is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege facts that defendant expressly or impliedly assumed liabilities from the predecessor lessee. Demurrer on cause of action for specific performance is OVERRULED because there are sufficient facts pled to allege application of the discovery rule exception.= (501/REQ)
